name: python3-xlrd
title: python3-xlrd
summary: extract data from Microsoft Excel spreadsheet files (Python3 version)
description:
extract data from Microsoft Excel spreadsheet files (Python3 version)
xlrd is a Python library to Extract data from new and old Microsoft
Excel spreadsheets. It supports both .xls and .xlsx files (from Excel
2007).
.
xlrd is a pure Python module and does not require any dependency
outside of the standard Python distribution.
.
This package contains only the Python3 version of xlrd.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use runxlrd because extract data from Microsoft Excel spreadsheet files (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use runxlrd as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `runxlrd [options] command [input-file-patterns]` as documented upstream for runxlrd.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `runxlrd 3rows *blah*.xls` as documented upstream for runxlrd.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `runxlrd -e koi8_r 3rows myfile.xls` as documented upstream for runxlrd.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair runxlrd with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `runxlrd --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
